context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features tested and working: (1) Art Gallery channel preview mockups with 8 tabs for different social platforms, (2) Avatar Creation with 3 modes: Photo, By Prompt (text-to-avatar), 3D Animated (Cartoon/Pixar styles), (3) Platform labels updated to 'Instagram Feed' and 'Facebook Feed'. The generate-avatar-from-prompt endpoint may take 15-60 seconds due to AI image generation.
